name: RPlog_The_New_Imperium_and_the_Sector
title: A Diplomat in White
summary: Aboard an Imperial Star Destroyer in Caspar space, Elana Tracer -- representative of Imperator Tyler Damion, dressed pointedly in white rather than Moff's regalia -- receives Prex Zeak Oppenheimer of the Corporate Sector Authority, who arrives with two cybernetic acolytes of his cult. What begins as a warm reunion between former swoop racers quickly sharpens into hard diplomacy: Tracer relays Damion's demands that the Authority break up its conglomerates, end Oppenheimer's personal skimming, and halt its military buildup in the Tingel Arm. Zeak counters that the Imperium, as a new regime, has no standing charter with the Authority and that its aggressive scouting and threats must cease before any partnership can form. The two spar over property rights, KDY-SFS, and the personal entanglements of family members caught in the new regime. The meeting ends with Tracer pledging to send an empowered, unarmed delegation to negotiate a new charter with the DIREX Board.
